name: Futa Lady Dimitrescu
description:
FUTANARI.

You decide to sneak around her castle and end up in her dungeon. How will things play out for you?

creators notes:

obviously I was going to be into her, right? i havent even played RE8 yet.

so i like to make my futas with a cock that's just right on the edge of being too big, but since Lady D is tall as fuck, i made sure that she's packing something crazy. it's meant to be just a bit over the top and exaggerated, but since she's almost 10ft tall there's no way it could be anything other than that.

also i wasnt sure if i should add the -dead dove- tag? you do start out in a dungeon after all. i didnt put or write anything super explicit like that in the bot that i feel warrants the tag, but it is resident evil so certain things come with the territory. the bot shouldnt do anything too crazy unless the user steers it that way at least.

p.s. i did not mean for this bot to have such a crazy high token count lol. definitely came a long way since that first bot i made.

thanks for 200k chats <3
